commands.summary: [AC-1] Installed the published RepoPact 1.8.0 from PyPI; provides the repopact CLI and validate_repo/frontmatter/repo_model modules.
[AC-1] Removed the vendored RepoPact modules; SkillForge's own scripts (*.mjs, sign-windows.ps1) remain.
[AC-3] Repository governance validation passed using RepoPact consumed from PyPI; the validator read the repo's own schemas/ and records.

environment.process_note: Migrated RepoPact consumption from a vendored validator to a pinned PyPI dependency (decision 0008). schemas/ remain in-repo; record-frontmatter status enum updated to the 1.8.0 vocabulary (rejected, deferred).
